titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Photographs of gun-shot injuries.
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

profiledesc.creation:
Finding aid encoded by RMC Staff
2008

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

titlepage.titleproper: Guide to the Photographs Of Gun-shot Injuries
titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu
http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

titlepage.date: © 2002 Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Photo album showing Union Army Civil War soldiers' gunshot wounds. Printed matter identifying the soldier pictured and describing the context and outcome of his case is mounted on the verso of each photograph.
No title page; author, title and imprint from spine.
State: New YorkAge: 50Regiment: Co E 2nd NYHAWound: Head
State: New YorkAge: 37Regiment: Co E 2nd NY Vols.Wound: Head
State: New YorkAge: 34Regiment: Co D 46th NY VolsWound: HeadNotes: Interesting details of treatment described
State: New YorkAge: 34Regiment: Co D 46th NY VolsWound: HeadNotes: Appears healed
State: VirginiaAge: 21Regiment: Co E 2nd VA CavWound: Head
State: New YorkAge: 27Regiment: Co H 8th NY CavWound: HeadNotes: Back view
State: New YorkAge: 27Regiment: Co H 8th NY CavWound: HeadNotes: 2nd photo, attendant holding him by the hair, appears comatose
State: West VirginiaAge: 26-28?Regiment: Co C 6th WVA CavWound: Head
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 28Regiment: Co D 198th PA VolsWound: Head
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 28Regiment: Co D 198th PA VolsWound: HeadNotes: 2nd photo, nearly healed
State: MichiganAge: 21Regiment: Co I 26th MI VolsWound: Head
State: IllinoisAge: 27Regiment: Co C 39th IL VolsWound: Head
State: New YorkAge: UnknownRegiment: Co E 15th NY CavWound: Head
State: New YorkAge: 37Regiment: Co B 91st NY VolsWound: Head
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 42Regiment: Co F 125th PA VolsWound: Head
State: New HampshireAge: 18Regiment: Co D 6th NH VolsWound: Head and neck
State: OhioAge: 28Regiment: Co G 122nd OH VolsWound: Head
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 20-25?Regiment: Co H 82nd PA VolsWound: HeadNotes: Sabre cuts rather than bullets
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 24Regiment: Co G 21st PA CavWound: Head wound, sabre
State: MassachusettsAge: 21Regiment: Co E 29th MA VolsWound: Near eye
State: Rhode IslandAge: 21Regiment: Co B 4th RI VolsWound: Right eye
State: Rhode IslandAge: 21Regiment: Co B 4th RI VolsWound: EyeNotes: 2nd photo
State: New YorkAge: 16Regiment: Co A 46th NY VolsWound: EyeNotes: Gruesome
State: New YorkAge: 16Regiment: Co A 46th NY VolsWound: EyeNotes: Recovered
State: New YorkAge: 24Regiment: Co D 77th NY VolsWound: Face
State: New YorkAge: 24Regiment: Co D 77th NY VolsWound: FaceNotes: Improved
State: VermontAge: 42Regiment: Co D 17th VT VolsWound: Face
State: New YorkAge: 23Regiment: 27th NY BatteryWound: Face, chin
State: MichiganAge: 46Regiment: Co B 1st MIWound: Face
State: New YorkAge: 19Regiment: Co G 52nd NY VolsWound: Face
Wound: Just below left eyeNotes: No other information.
Wound: Just below left eyeNotes: 2nd photo, same as 030, wound healed with scar but eye appears intact
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 27Regiment: Co I 209th PA VolsWound: Face wounds
State: New YorkAge: 18Regiment: Co B 39th NY VolsWound: Face
State: New YorkAge: 22Regiment: Co G 15th NYHAWound: FaceNotes: Healed with scars
State: MarylandAge: 20s?Regiment: Co B 6th MD VolsWound: Back of neckNotes: back view only, no face shown
State: New YorkAge: 20Regiment: Co E 6th NY VolsWound: Face
State: MassachusettsAge: 19Regiment: Co F 29th MA VolsWound: Left foreArmNotes: Resection by Bontecou, healed with scars
State: ConnecticutAge: 24Regiment: Co D 6th CN VolsWound: Left shoulderNotes: Side view, 1st of 3 photos
State: ConnecticutAge: 24Regiment: Co D 6th CN VolsWound: Left shoulderNotes: 2nd photo, fully dressed, front view
State: ConnecticutAge: 24Regiment: Co D 6th CN VolsWound: Left shoulderNotes: 3rd photo, front view, Shoulder, small square photo
State: New YorkAge: 23Regiment: Co B 14th NY VolsWound: Right shoulder
State: New YorkAge: 23Regiment: Co B 14th NY VolsWound: Right shoulderNotes: 2nd photo
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 31Regiment: Co A 205th PA VolsWound: Right shoulder
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 31Regiment: Co A 205th PA VolsWound: Right shoulderNotes: 2nd photo, wound looks worse
State: New YorkAge: 32Regiment: Co A 63rd NY VolsWound: Left shoulder and backNotes: Born in Ireland, name different in notes and on sign
State: New YorkAge: 32Regiment: Co A 63rd NY VolsWound: Left shoulder and backNotes: 2nd photo or possibly a different man
State: New YorkAge: 30Regiment: Co D 4th NY VolsWound: Left shoulderNotes: Sling used to support swollen lower arm, surgical incision stitched
State: New YorkAge: 20Regiment: 3rd NY BatteryWound: Right shoulder
State: New YorkAge: 25Regiment: Co G 1st NY CavWound: Left arm
State: New YorkAge: 25Regiment: Co G 1st NY CavWound: Left armNotes: 2nd photo, arm not amputated but weak
State: New YorkAge: 36Regiment: Co E 112th NY VolsWound: Right armNotes: Healed, bone removed, limp
State: New YorkAge: 36Regiment: Co E 112th NY VolsWound: Right armNotes: 2nd photo
State: New YorkAge: 18Regiment: Co H 2nd NY CavWound: Left arm
State: New YorkAge: 18Regiment: Co H 2nd NY CavWound: Left armNotes: 2nd photo
State: OhioAge: 22Regiment: Co E 49th OH VolsWound: Right arm
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 23Regiment: Co H 209th PA VolsWound: Right arm
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 42Regiment: Co B 20th PA VolsWound: Left arm, amputated
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 42Regiment: Co B 20th PA VolsWound: Right arm, amputated
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 19Regiment: Co D 53rd PA VolsWound: Left arm, amputated
State: New YorkAge: 30+?Regiment: Co F 9th NYHAWound: Left arm, amputated
State: New YorkAge: 29Regiment: Co K 15th NYHAWound: Left arm, amputated
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 21Regiment: Co D 200th PA VolsWound: Right shoulder
State: New YorkAge: 27Regiment: Co G 4th NYHAWound: Right shoulder
State: WisconsinAge: 26Regiment: Co G 5th WI VolsWound: Left shoulder
State: New YorkAge: 20Regiment: Co K 4th NYHAWound: Right shoulder and back
Wound: Right shoulderNotes: Unlabeled photo.
State: New YorkAge: 18Regiment: Co K 111th NY VolsWound: ShoulderNotes: Label says Francisco wounded in the left Shoulder but the photo it backs shows a man wounded in the right Shoulder
State: New YorkAge: 26Regiment: Co B 7th NY ArtilleryWound: Left shoulderNotes: Possibly a photo of Francisco, Donan's name
State: LouisianaAge: 28Regiment: Co I 8th LA Vols, CSAWound: Left shoulder
State: New JerseyAge: 23Regiment: Co G 3rd NJ CavWound: Right arm and mouthNotes: Perhaps not the man in the label. No visible scars from face wound.
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 24Regiment: Co E 105th PA VolsWound: Right arm
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 29Regiment: Co B 198th PAWound: Right arm
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 18Regiment: 198th PA VolsWound: Right shoulderNotes: Notes in Dr. Bontecou's hand
State: New YorkAge: 19Regiment: Co K 185th NYWound: Left arm
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 23Regiment: Co K 82nd PA VolsWound: Left arm
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 28Regiment: Co H 205th PA VolsWound: Right shoulder and wrist
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 45Regiment: Co D 1st PA CavWound: Right armNotes: Some gray in hair and beard here
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 45Regiment: Co D 1st PA CavWound: Right armNotes: 2nd photo, no gray in hair and beard
State: Pennsylvania and GermanyAge: 20s?Regiment: Co K 47th PA VolsWound: Right elbowNotes: Splint device used. Photo taken by Dr. Hudson of New York, "who applied the brace."
State: Pennsylvania and GermanyAge: 20s?Regiment: Co K 47th PA VolsWound: Right elbowNotes: Photo taken by Dr. Hudson of New York, "who applied the brace."
State: UnknownAge: 21Regiment: Co E 2nd US InfantryWound: Right arm, elbow
State: New YorkAge: 22Regiment: Co D 8th NY CavWound: Right elbowNotes: Sitting upright, mostly healed scars
State: New YorkAge: 22Regiment: Co D 8th NY CavWound: Right elbowNotes: 2nd photo, recumbent, very swollen arm, lying on black rubber sheet
State: New YorkAge: 22Regiment: Co D 8th NY CavWound: Right elbowNotes: 3rd photo, swollen arm, surgical wound is open, appears ready for stitching, there is a thread lying across the arm
Wound: Right elbowNotes: Young man, no other information.
State: New YorkAge: 29Regiment: Co K 125th NY VolsWound: Right elbowNotes: Hospital uniform and dressings
State: UnknownAge: 32Regiment: Co I Scott's 900 CavWound: Left elbow, Right foreArmNotes: Fractured both arms in fall from horse
State: New YorkAge: 39Regiment: Co I 86th NY VolsWound: Left elbow
State: New YorkAge: 39Regiment: Co I 86th NY VolsWound: Left elbow Notes: 2nd photo
State: New YorkAge: 21Regiment: Co B 185th NY VolsWound: ArmNotes: View of arm only
State: New YorkAge: 21Regiment: Co B 185th NY VolsWound: ArmNotes: 2nd photo, full view
State: New YorkAge: 20Regiment: Co H 185th NY VolsWound: Right elbowNotes: Gruesome
State: New YorkAge: 35Regiment: Co B 185th NY VolsWound: Left arm, amputated
State: MassachusettsAge: 34Regiment: Co I 1st MA HAWound: Left wrist
State: MassachusettsAge: 34Regiment: Co I 1st MA HAWound: 2nd photo, Arm after amputation
State: New YorkAge: 34Regiment: Co B 21st NY Lit ArtyWound: Right arm, amputated
State: New JerseyAge: 22Regiment: Co A 186th NJ VolsWound: Left arm, amputated
State: New YorkAge: 20-25?Regiment: Co E 109th NY VolsWound: Right arm, amputated
State: New YorkAge: 34Regiment: Co H 106th NY VolsWound: Arm, amputatedNotes: No face shown in the picture, photo is only of the amputated arm
State: MichiganAge: 20s?Regiment: Co K 1st MI S.S.Wound: blinded, unknown causeNotes: Possibly Native American. Congenitally missing right hand, recruited anyway
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 39Regiment: Co I 198th PA VolsWound: Left arm
State: New YorkAge: 32Regiment: Co C 24th NY CavWound: Left arm
State: New YorkAge: 21Regiment: Co C 125th NY VolsWound: Right arm
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 43Regiment: Co C 87th PA VolsWound: Right armNotes: Recumbent
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 43Regiment: Co C 87th PA VolsWound: Right armNotes: 2nd photo, sitting up, with a rubber sheet protecting clothes from discharge
State: New YorkAge: 17Regiment: Co H 121st NYWound: Right handNotes: Hand only, no face is sown
State: New YorkAge: 17Regiment: Co H 121st NYWound: Right handNotes: 2nd photo, sitting up
State: New YorkAge: 40Regiment: Co M 14th NYHAWound: Left handNotes: 3 middle fingers amputated
State: New YorkAge: 26 or 20Regiment: Co E 61st NY VolsWound: Left handNotes: Amputated forefinger
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 41Regiment: Co I 8th PA CavWound: Left hand
State: New YorkAge: 18Regiment: Co G 52nd NY VolsWound: Right handNotes: Amputated fingers
State: MassachusettsAge: 37Regiment: Co B 32nd MA VolsWound: Left hand
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 24Regiment: Co G 200th PA VolsWound: Right side
State: New YorkAge: 23Regiment: Co D 139th NY VolsWound: Right side
State: WisconsinAge: 19Regiment: Co F 5th WI VolsWound: Right front chest
State: New YorkAge: 22Regiment: Co C 15th NY CavWound: back, side view
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 26Regiment: Co I 214th PA VolsWound: Right chest
State: VermontAge: 46Regiment: Co G 11th Vermont VolsWound: ChestNotes: Back view, extensive sores
State: VermontAge: 46Regiment: Co G 11th Vermont VolsWound: ChestNotes: 2nd photo of face, possibly dead
State: New YorkAge: 27Regiment: Co D 4th NYHAWound: Right shoulder and back
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 22Regiment: Co A 155th PA VolsWound: Right side
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 40Regiment: Co B 208th PA VolsWound: Left shoulder
State: New YorkAge: 26Regiment: Co H 185th NY VolsWound: Right shoulder
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 23 or 28Regiment: Co D 210th PA VolsWound: Right chestNotes: Damaged Photo
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 29Regiment: Co F 57th PA CavWound: Abdomen
State: VermontAge: UnknownRegiment: Co K 10th VT VolsWound: Right chestNotes: Person in the photo looks young
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 21Regiment: Co H 5th PA CavWound: Right arm and side
State: WisconsinAge: 18Regiment: Co H 6th WI VolsWound: Left backNotes: Emaciated
State: VermontAge: 34Regiment: Co A 5th VT VolsWound: Abdomen
State: MassachusettsAge: 22Regiment: Co E 1st MA HAWound: Left back
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 19Regiment: Co E 200th PA VolsWound: Right sideNotes: Very sick man
Wound: Right back ShoulderNotes: No other information. Back view, possibly Bowers
Wound: Right back ShoulderNotes: Photo of face, either Bowers recovered or face of the man in photo 020
Wound: Left, underArm chest
Wound: Left, underArm chestNotes: Back view, possibly of 022
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 21Regiment: Co B 55th PA VolsWound: Right chestNotes: Handwritten notes by Dr. Bontecou
State: New YorkAge: 18Regiment: Co A 185th NY VolsWound: chest
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 18Regiment: Co F 93rd PA VolsWound: Right back Shoulder
Wound: BackNotes: Possibly Rager, no other information.
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 26Regiment: Co K 200th PA VolsWound: Right back
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 22Regiment: Co C 207th PA VolsWound: Right shoulder
State: New YorkAge: 33Regiment: Co B 189th NY VolsWound: Left and Right back Shoulder
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 20s?Regiment: Co K 116th PA VolsWound: Back
State: OhioAge: 28Regiment: Co I 13th OhioWound: Right back
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 26Regiment: 198th PA VolsWound: Neck
State: New YorkAge: 34Regiment: Co G 9th NY CavWound: Left armNotes: Back view
State: New YorkAge: 39Regiment: Co C 7th NY VolsWound: Right shoulder and backNotes: Back view
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 26Regiment: Co H 49th PA VolsWound: Right hip
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 26Regiment: Co H 49th PA VolsWound: Right hipNotes: 2nd photo, front pubic area
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 20Regiment: Co H 82nd PA VolsWound: Right neck and Shoulder
State: New YorkAge: 20s?Regiment: Co H 125th NY VolsWound: Left shoulder
State: New YorkAge: UnknownRegiment: Co A 95th NY VolsWound: Left hip and abdomenNotes: Man in photo appears to be very young
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 35Regiment: Co H 110th PA VolsWound: Left back
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 21Regiment: Co G 119th PA VolsWound: Left shoulder
State: MassachusettsAge: 23Regiment: Co F 57th MA VolsWound: Left backNotes: Back view
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 19Regiment: Co F 211th PA VolsWound: Right back neckNotes: Back view
State: New YorkAge: 29Regiment: Co F 5th NYHAWound: Right shoulder backNotes: Back view
State: New YorkAge: 21Regiment: Co C 91st NY VolsWound: Left back abdomen
State: New YorkAge: 49Regiment: Co F 39th NY VolsWound: Right hip and abdomen
State: New YorkAge: 24Regiment: Co B 8th NYHAWound: Right hipNotes: Back view, healed and scarred
State: New YorkAge: 24Regiment: Co L 3rd NYHAWound: Right hip
Notes: Possibly Wrightman. Gruesome photo, suffering face.
State: New YorkAge: 40Regiment: Co D 15th NY CavWound: Right hip and back, bedsoresNotes: Back view, no face visible
Wound: Right hip
State: North CarolinaAge: 22Regiment: Co K 18th NC VolsWound: Left thigh
State: New YorkAge: 27Regiment: Co G 7th NY VolsWound: Right thigh
State: DelawareAge: 19Regiment: 1st DE VolsWound: Right thighNotes: A stocky man who looks older than 19
State: DelawareAge: 19Regiment: 1st DE VolsWound: Right thighNotes: 2nd photo, back view
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 18Regiment: Co G 116th PA VolsWound: Left thigh
State: IllinoisAge: 35Regiment: 25th ILWound: Right thigh
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 37Regiment: Co F 91st PA VolsWound: Right legNotes: Crudely made crutches
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 37Regiment: Co F 91st PA VolsWound: Right legNotes: 2nd photo, shorter leg supported by cushion, crutches, attendants. Possibly an image of Bontecou
State: MassachusettsAge: 22Regiment: Co F 19th MA VolsWound: Right arm, Right thigh
State: MichiganAge: UnknownRegiment: Co B 5th MIWound: Right thighNotes: Company name hard to read.
State: MichiganAge: UnknownRegiment: Co B 5th MIWound: Right thighNotes: Same photo as 062, reprinted
State: Washington, D.C.Age: 64Regiment: Resident of Soldier's HomeWound: Right leg amputated
State: New YorkAge: 22Regiment: Co I 91st NY VolsWound: Left leg amputated
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 19Regiment: Co I 8th PA CavWound: Right leg amputated
State: UnknownAge: 25Regiment: Co H 24th (or 17th) U.S. Inf Notes: Photo of a piece of bone only
Notes: Emaciated man, swollen stump of a leg, sign says 17th USI. Possibly Wilkins
State: New YorkAge: 20Regiment: Co G 9th NY CavWound: Right leg amputated
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 32Regiment: Co K 118th PA VolsWound: Left leg amputated
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 32Regiment: Co K 118th PA VolsWound: Left leg amputatedNotes: 2nd photo, piece of bone
Wound: Right leg amputatedNotes: Possibly a badly exposed photo of Parquette
State: New YorkAge: 21Regiment: Co A 1st NYHAWound: Right leg amputatedNotes: This is a square photo on the reverse of 072
State: New YorkAge: 23Regiment: Co H 8th NY VolsWound: Left leg amputated
State: New YorkAge: 18Regiment: Co A 66th NY VolsWound: Right leg amputatedNotes: Notes in Dr. Bontecou's hand. Gruesome photo.
State: New YorkAge: 21Regiment: Co K 2nd NY CavWound: Left leg amputated
State: New YorkAge: 21Regiment: Co K 2nd NY CavWound: Left leg amputatedNotes: 2nd photo, healed
State: UnknownAge: 23Regiment: Co B 5th U.S. CavWound: Right thigh
State: New YorkAge: 28Regiment: Co G 6th NY CavWound: Left thighNotes: Back view, no face visible
State: PennsylvaniaAge: UnknownRegiment: Co I 21st PA CavWound: Right thighNotes: Man in photo appears to be young
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 23Regiment: Co A 198th PA VolsWound: Right thigh
State: New YorkAge: 30Regiment: Co I 46th NY VolsWound: Left hip
State: New YorkAge: 25-30?Regiment: Co A 2nd NY CavWound: Right thigh
State: VermontAge: 25Regiment: Co E 1st VT CavWound: Left thigh
State: VermontAge: 25Regiment: Co E 1st VT CavWound: Left hip
Wound: Left thigh at hip jointNotes: Front view. Possibly an image of Stone (087)
State: MaineAge: 18Regiment: Co F 1st ME CavWound: Left thighNotes: 2nd photo. Back view, wound appears lower than one in 086.
State: MaineAge: 18Regiment: Co F 1st ME CavWound: Left thighNotes: Side and back view. Square photo on back of 087.
State: New YorkAge: 18Regiment: Co B 188th NY VolsWound: Left thighNotes: Back view, no face visible
Wound: Right thighNotes: Damaged Photo, back view, no face visible
State: New YorkAge: 28Regiment: Co G 2nd NYHWound: Left thighNotes: Square photo on back of 090.
State: New YorkAge: 19Regiment: Co A 4th NY VolsWound: Left thighNotes: View of leg only, no face visible.
State: MichiganAge: 27Regiment: Co H 1st MI CavWound: Right thighNotes: View of knees and legs
State: VirginiaAge: 29Regiment: Co A 16th VA Vols, CSAWound: Right thighNotes: View of knees, no face visible
State: VirginiaAge: 29Regiment: Co A 16th VA Vols, CSAWound: Right thighNotes: View of face
State: VirginiaAge: 29Regiment: Co A 16th VA Vols, CSAWound: Right thighNotes: 3rd photo
State: OhioAge: 23Regiment: Co G 2nd OH CavWound: Right kneeNotes: View of knees only, no face visible
State: OhioAge: 23Regiment: Co G 2nd OH CavWound: Right kneeNotes: 2nd photo, this photo looks to have been taken during the surgery, before the final stitching and after the removal of the patella.
State: VermontAge: 22Regiment: Co B 3rd VT VolsWound: Left kneeNotes: View of knee, no face is visible.
Wound: both lower legsNotes: Possibly Mason, unlabeled photo of legs, no face is visible
State: New YorkAge: 22Regiment: Co B 16th NY CavWound: Left leg Notes: On crutches
State: New YorkAge: 26Regiment: Co B 104th NY VolsWound: Right legNotes: View of leg only, no face visible.
State: New YorkAge: 17Regiment: Co D 24th NY CavWound: Right leg
State: New YorkAge: 17Regiment: Co D 24th NY CavWound: Right legNotes: View of leg only, no face visible.
State: MaineAge: 46Regiment: Co C 20th ME VolsWound: Right legNotes: View of leg only, no face visible.
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 32Regiment: Co I 116th PA VolsWound: Left leg
State: New YorkAge: 23Regiment: Co A 7th NY VolsWound: Left leg
Wound: Right leg, kneeNotes: No other information.
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 18Regiment: Co K 81st PA VolsWound: Left legNotes: View of leg only, no face visible.
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 23Regiment: Co K 98th PA VolsWound: Left leg amputated below the kneeNotes: Shown in wheel chair
State: MichiganAge: 22Regiment: Co B 8th MI VolsWound: Right leg amputated below the knee
State: MichiganAge: 22Regiment: Co B 8th MI VolsWound: Right leg amputated below the kneeNotes: 2nd photo, view of foot only

State: MichiganAge: 22Regiment: Co B 8th MI VolsWound: Right leg amputated below the kneeNotes: 3rd photo, showing amputated stump with protruding thread. Notes read, "Wounded right arm, upper third" and "Abscess made its appearance at ankle joint." Amputated foot
State: PennsylvaniaAge: 41Regiment: Co D 17th PA CavWound: Right leg amputated below the kneeNotes: Swollen
State: PennsylvaniaAge: UnknownRegiment: Co G 67th PA VolsWound: Left foot amputatedNotes: View of legs and amputated foot, no face is visible.
State: PennsylvaniaAge: UnknownRegiment: Co G 67th PA VolsWound: Left foot amputatedNotes: 2nd photo, view of necrosed left foot after amputation
State: New YorkAge: 18Regiment: Co I 111th NY VolsWound: Right leg amputated below the knee
State: New YorkAge: 18Regiment: Co I 111th NY VolsWound: Right leg amputated below the kneeNotes: 2nd photo, view of right foot and leg before amputation
State: MaineAge: 29Regiment: Co I 20th ME VolsWound: Left foot Notes: View of amputated left foot, no face is viable.
State: New YorkAge: 17Regiment: CO M 24th NY CavWound: Left footNotes: View of amputated left foot, no face is visible.

did.unittitle: Note in Dr. Bontecou's writing "floor of the Operating Room after a morning's work"

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Photographs of gun-shot injuries #4718. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
